title: Blackout
description: Represents a blackout (maintenance window) in Enterprise Manager. Blackouts suppress alerting and notifications for specified targets during scheduled maintenance periods.

targets.description: List of targets included in the blackout.

timeCreated.description: Timestamp when the blackout was created.

timeUpdated.description: Timestamp of the last blackout update.

canonicalLink.description: Canonical URI for this blackout resource.
